description: A square (1080x1080) social-media tip card from DHS's 'Know2Protect' campaign. The background is a flat blue scene split into a lighter sky band across the top and a darker blue lower field. The top band is decorated with cheerful summer paper-cutout emoji-style icons: white clouds, a yellow sun, a camera, a red-and-white life preserver/ring buoy, a green popsicle, blue sunglasses, a slice of watermelon, and small orange butterflies. A yellow rounded banner near the top center holds bold black text 'TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT'. On the left, large white outlined text reads 'TIP 1'. The center features two overlapping illustrated speech bubbles (one orange-outlined, one magenta-outlined) each containing an ellipsis of three dots. Bold white centered text below reads 'Start an open, two-way conversation with your child.' At the bottom center are the white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal and the 'know2protect' logo (a speech-bubble-with-dots mark) with the tagline 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation'.
notable_text: TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT; TIP 1; Start an open, two-way conversation with your child.; know2protect — Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation
